creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
On this testcase c++filt doesn't assert but doesn't decode the symbol either: _ZNSt3__116__copy_unalignedINS_6vectorIbNS_9allocatorIbEEEELb0EEENS_14__bit_iteratorIT_Lb0EXLi0EEEENS5_IS6_XT0_EXLi0EEEES8_S7_

c++filt from the binutils package does decode it correctly.

Overall c++filt from the base is quite far behind of the c++filt from the binutils package in terms of stability and symbol support.
